title: WhatsApp usernames could open the platform to impersonations and scams, warn cybersecurity experts: Here is how
summary: Meta's WhatsApp is launching usernames for privacy, enabling users to interact without disclosing phone numbers. While this can protect user identity, experts warn of risks like impersonation and scams, highlighting the necessity for robust anti-abuse measures to ensure safety amid these changes.

title: Key details about iPhone 18 Pro leak online after hackers gain access to 630 GB data from Tata Electronics
summary: Leaks from Tata Electronics reveal details about Apple's upcoming iPhone 18 Pro, including component suppliers and internal documents after a ransomware attack. This breach, involving over 200,000 files, threatens Apple's supplier relationships and business strategy ahead of the September launch.

summary: WhatsApp, which says it has more than 3 billion users globally, has until now allowed users to be contacted by anyone who has their phone number.

summary: The iPhone 17 Pro, currently priced at ₹1,34,900, could reportedly retail between ₹1,54,900 and ₹1,69,900. The iPhone 17 Pro Max may be priced between ₹1,84,900 and ₹1,99,900, compared with its current price of ₹1,49,900.

title: Centre asks Meta to pause WhatsApp username rollout; seeks reply in three days
summary: It has ​​directed Meta to furnish a detailed explanation of the feature within three days. The company has been asked not to roll out the feature until consultation on the matter is over, sources told ET.

title: Sony to end discs for new PlayStation releases as gaming shifts online
summary: Sony is phasing out physical game discs for new PlayStation releases starting January 2028, embracing a fully digital future as online purchases dominate. title: Meta building cloud business to sell excess AI capacity, Bloomberg News reports
summary: Meta Platforms is reportedly exploring a move into the cloud computing business, aiming to lease out its surplus AI computing power. This strategic shift could lessen Meta's dependence on advertising revenue and position it as a competitor against tech giants like Amazon and Microsoft.
